ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hash_tables" (
  "hash_table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hash table implementation */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hash table implementation (e.g., DH, LP, QP, CK, SPL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hash table implementation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hash table implementation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hash table implementation was last updated */,
  "implementation_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the hash table implementation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hash_table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "hash_table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hash table implementation used in the experiment */,
  "load_factor" REAL /* Load factor of the hash table */,
  "n" INTEGER /* Number of elements in the hash table */,
  "n_hash_functions" INTEGER /* Number of hash functions used */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Seed value for the hash function */,
  "key_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of keys used in the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  "experiment_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., pending, running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_hash_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("hash_table_id") REFERENCES hash_tables ("hash_table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "avg_success_probes" REAL /* Average number of successful probes */,
  "avg_fail_probes" REAL /* Average number of failed probes */,
  "build_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to build the hash table */,
  "success_mean_time" REAL /* Mean time for successful searches */,
  "fail_mean_time" REAL /* Mean time for failed searches */,
  "success_max_time" INTEGER /* Max time for successful searches */,
  "success_min_time" INTEGER /* Min time for successful searches */,
  "fail_max_time" INTEGER /* Max time for failed searches */,
  "fail_min_time" INTEGER /* Min time for failed searches */,
  "false_positives" INTEGER /* Number of false positives */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was logged */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
